_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of virtualization technologies and virtual machine development and maintenance.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated retraining pipelines, model versioning, A/B testing infrastructure, and canary deployment patterns.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.509), AI-K-025 (AI, cosine: 0.474).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.412). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [development, machine, maintenance, technologies, virtual, virtualization] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.904, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.051 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (85.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of virtualization technologies and virtual machine development and mai" and "Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated r". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.523 > STS 0.412 (gap +0.110). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [development, machine, maintenance, technologies, virtual, virtualization]. WIDAI-only: [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 85.1% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
